name: Convert CSV data to formatted Markdown report
prompt: Read inventory.csv and create a formatted Markdown document saved as inventory_report.md. The document should include: (1) A title '# Inventory Report', (2) A summary section with total products count, total inventory value (sum of price * stock for all items), number of unique categories, and number of unique suppliers, (3) The full inventory as a Markdown table with all columns, (4) A 'Low Stock Alert' section listing products with stock below 20 (include product name and current stock), (5) A 'Category Breakdown' section with a table showing each category, item count, and total stock for that category.

criteria.testPattern: all products in table|table has columns|Wireless Mouse row
Low Stock|Standing Desk alert|Ergonomic Chair alert

origin.notes: auto-converted from legacy skill-bench TaskDefinition by tools/convert-from-skill-bench.ts
